name: MOTIVE Crime and Mystery Festival 2026

location.name: Victoria University at the University of Toronto

description:
We're turning up the suspense!

Celebrating a milestone year, as MOTIVE 2026 unveils its most expansive and riveting programme to date, featuring more than 55 events, author talks, masterclasses and immersive workshops designed to captivate crime and mystery lovers of all kinds.

Featuring Shari Lapena, Clare Mackintosh, Nita Prose, Nicholas Shakespeare, Don Gillmor and Doug Johnstone.
